summary: Completed testing of Automation Rules features for CRM Fakulti. All 10 backend tests PASSED. All frontend UI tests PASSED. Fixed 2 bugs: 1) Route ordering bug for DELETE /api/automation/rules/all, 2) Missing toast import in ConfigPage.jsx
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed route ordering bug: DELETE /api/automation/rules/all was being matched by /api/automation/rules/{rule_id} because 'all' was treated as a rule_id. Moved /all route before /{rule_id} route.
Fixed missing toast import in ConfigPage.jsx - was causing 'toast is not defined' runtime error
seed_data_creation: Test rules created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Automation rules features fully tested. Key verified features: 1) GET /api/automation/rules/export returns all rules as JSON array, 2) POST /api/automation/rules/import accepts rules array and creates them in DB, 3) DELETE /api/automation/rules/all deletes all rules (route ordering fixed), 4) PUT /api/automation/rules/{id} accepts wa_template_name and wa_template_language fields (no more 422 error), 5) ConfigPage automation tab shows Exportar, Importar, Borrar Todas buttons, 6) Edit dialog opens with 'Actualizar' button and saves correctly, 7) Scheduler Automático banner with Ejecutar Ahora button is visible. Toast import was missing and has been fixed.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/automation/rules: PASS - Creates new rule with wa_template fields
backend_endpoints.PUT /api/automation/rules/{id}: PASS - Updates rule with wa_template_name and wa_template_language (no 422 error)
backend_endpoints.GET /api/automation/rules/export: PASS - Returns all rules as JSON array
backend_endpoints.POST /api/automation/rules/import: PASS - Accepts rules array and creates them in DB
backend_endpoints.DELETE /api/automation/rules/all: PASS - Deletes all rules (route ordering fixed)

frontend_ui.ejecutar_ahora_button: PASS - data-testid='run-automation-now' present in Scheduler Automático banner
frontend_ui.actualizar_button: PASS - Shows 'Actualizar' text in edit mode

bugs_fixed.bug: DELETE /api/automation/rules/all returning 'Regla eliminada' instead of deleted count
bugs_fixed.root_cause: FastAPI route ordering - /automation/rules/{rule_id} was defined before /automation/rules/all, so 'all' was being matched as a rule_id
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved DELETE /automation/rules/all route before DELETE /automation/rules/{rule_id} in server.py

bugs_fixed.bug: Runtime error 'toast is not defined' in ConfigPage.jsx
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Missing import statement for toast from sonner
